authorization_phrase_detected: YES start P175 POWER_LOTTO R2 advanced feature candidate plan

p174_summary.recommended_option: B — plan-only for advanced deferred candidates C03/C05/C06/C07
p174_summary.prior_probability_of_edge: LOW — consistent with cumulative R1 (P161-P170) + R2 Top 3 (P173) NULL evidence

honest_preface: P175 is a plan-only document. It does NOT represent a finding that advanced feature candidates will yield edge. The prior probability remains LOW. C03/C06/C07 have HIGH overfitting risk. This plan is produced to fulfill the user's goal of exhaustive exploration while maintaining pre-registration governance.

candidates.name: co_occurrence_pair_graph_strategy
candidates.feature_description: Number co-occurrence frequencies for pairs within the same actual POWER_LOTTO draw. Graph-based degree centrality computed from the pair co-occurrence adjacency matrix. Numbers ranked by centrality score; top-6 selected.
candidates.causal_feature_extraction_rule: For each target draw at index i, compute pair co-occurrence frequency using only draws[0..i-1]. Never use draws[i] or later draws in graph construction. Graph must be rebuilt for each target draw using strictly prior data.
candidates.leakage_prevention_rule: Strictly chronological cutoff by CAST(draw AS INTEGER). No lookahead. The pair adjacency matrix is rebuilt from scratch for each OOS draw using only prior draws.

frozen_config_candidates.lookback_window_draws: all prior draws (no windowing — full history up to target)
frozen_config_candidates.rationale: Degree centrality is simplest defensible metric. Threshold=2 avoids singleton noise. Must be frozen before P176 OOS.

candidates.overfitting_risk_explanation: 703 pairs in 38-number pool. Even with Bonferroni over the 4-candidate family (threshold=0.0125), pair-space data snooping during graph construction introduces additional Type I error inflation. The graph is re-fit on historical data — any spurious high-degree nodes may reflect training noise.
candidates.internal_pair_space_burden: C(38,2) = 703 possible edges. Any selection of 'high-centrality' nodes implicitly tests 703 pair comparisons. Bonferroni correction over the family-of-4 (threshold=0.0125) does NOT account for the internal pair-space selection — this is an additional testing burden that must be acknowledged.
candidates.correction_strategy: Report p_bonferroni over family=4. In P176 report section, separately document that pair-space selection was not corrected for and that effective Type I error rate may be higher than stated.
candidates.expected_null_reporting_behavior: If p_bonferroni >= 0.0125: report FAIL_CORRECTED. Do not interpret uncorrected p-values as positive signals. Do not retroactively narrow the pair threshold to improve results.

candidates.name: entropy_dispersion_controlled_strategy
candidates.feature_description: Predictions whose sum and span statistics (mean, MAD, variance) match the historical POWER_LOTTO draw distribution are scored higher. Candidate number sets are scored by dispersion-match to training draw distribution; top-6 by composite score.
candidates.causal_feature_extraction_rule: For each target draw at index i, compute the empirical distribution of draw sums, spans, and MAD from draws[0..i-1] only. Dispersion target parameters are derived from this prior distribution. No future draws enter the distribution estimate.
candidates.leakage_prevention_rule: Distribution parameters (mean, std of draw sums/spans) computed from strictly prior draws. Must use expanding window — never fixed window anchored to full dataset.

frozen_config_candidates.scoring_method: negative L2 distance from training distribution mean
frozen_config_candidates.rationale: L2 scoring against prior mean is simple and pre-declarable. No secondary tuning permitted.

candidates.overfitting_risk_explanation: Fewer free parameters than C03/C06/C07. Distribution parameters are continuous and estimated from prior draws only. Main risk: if training-draw distribution mean is non-stationary, OOS predictions may be miscalibrated.
candidates.internal_pair_space_burden: NOT APPLICABLE — continuous scoring, no discrete selection inflation
candidates.correction_strategy: Bonferroni over family=4 (threshold=0.0125). No additional internal correction needed.
candidates.expected_null_reporting_behavior: If p_bonferroni >= 0.0125: report FAIL_CORRECTED. Do not re-score using a different dispersion metric post-hoc.

candidates.name: regime_adaptive_window_strategy
candidates.feature_description: CUSUM change-point detection on hit rates to assign regime labels (high-activity / neutral / low-activity) to each draw. Strategy selects numbers using a frequency window sized to the current regime. Window size adapts based on the most recently detected regime.
candidates.causal_feature_extraction_rule: CUSUM must use ONE-SIDED historical lookback only. At each target draw i, CUSUM processes draws[0..i-1] sequentially and outputs the current regime label. The regime label for draw i is determined ONLY from draws before i. Two-sided CUSUM or any future-aware smoothing is leakage.
candidates.leakage_prevention_rule: No regime label from draw i or later may influence prediction for draw i. Regime detection is strictly causal: it processes the sequence from draw 0 to draw i-1 and outputs a single label. This label is used to choose the frequency window size for draw i's prediction.

frozen_config_candidates.rationale: CUSUM threshold=2.0 and slack=0.5 are conservative defaults. Window sizes correspond to P170 non-stationarity finding (recent draws differ). All parameters must be frozen before P176 OOS.

candidates.overfitting_risk_explanation: CUSUM threshold, slack, and 3 regime window sizes = 5 free parameters. Even with pre-declaration, the prior probability of fitting these to POWER_LOTTO's 1913-draw history is substantial. P170 confirmed non-stationarity — this MOTIVATES the approach but does NOT guarantee it will generalize.
candidates.p170_connection: P170 showed non-stationarity (Window 2 below random at all thresholds). This motivates regime-adaptive window. However, non-stationarity itself may be non-stationary — the regime may shift again in OOS. P170 evidence is motivation, not deployment evidence.
candidates.internal_pair_space_burden: NOT APPLICABLE — single regime label per draw, no discrete selection inflation
candidates.no_future_labels_rule: STRICT: the regime label at draw i may only reference draws 0..i-1. Any implementation that assigns regime labels using a smoothed signal including draws >= i is a leakage violation and must be rejected.
candidates.correction_strategy: Bonferroni over family=4 (threshold=0.0125). No additional correction for regime parameter choices (all pre-declared).
candidates.expected_null_reporting_behavior: If p_bonferroni >= 0.0125: report FAIL_CORRECTED. Do not re-tune CUSUM parameters post-hoc. Do not claim regime detection improved results if OOS is NULL.

candidates.name: hybrid_rank_aggregation_strategy
candidates.feature_description: Borda-count rank aggregation of 4 independent feature rankings: recency-weighted frequency (C01), gap-adjusted overdue (C02), zone-adjusted frequency (C04), and pair-graph centrality (C03). The aggregated rank selects top-6 numbers by combined score.
candidates.causal_feature_extraction_rule: Each component ranking (C01/C02/C04/C03) must be computed using only draws[0..i-1] for target draw i. The Borda-count aggregation is then applied to the 4 independently-computed rankings. No component ranking may use future draws.
candidates.leakage_prevention_rule: Same as C01/C02/C04/C03 leakage prevention rules applied individually. The aggregation itself (Borda count) introduces no additional leakage — it is a deterministic function of the 4 input rankings.
candidates.dependency_on_p173_null: C01/C02/C04 were evaluated in P173 and all FAIL_CORRECTED individually. Borda-count aggregation of individually-null signals may not yield a composite signal. This is the primary risk: combining weak individual signals may amplify noise rather than signal.

frozen_config_candidates.component_weights: equal weight (each component rank contributes equally to Borda count)
frozen_config_candidates.borda_tie_breaking: alphabetical by candidate_id (C01 > C02 > C04 > C03)
frozen_config_candidates.rationale: Equal weights avoid weight-grid overfitting. Tie-breaking is deterministic. Must be frozen before P176 OOS.

candidates.overfitting_risk_explanation: While individual weights are equal (no tuning), the approach implicitly assumes that the 4 components carry equal information. Given P173 NULL (C01/C02/C04 all FAIL_CORRECTED), the prior expectation is that rank aggregation of null signals = null result. Overfitting risk comes from the implicit assumption that combining these signals yields a non-null composite.
candidates.internal_pair_space_burden: Inherits C03 pair-space burden for the co-occurrence ranking component. See C03 documentation.
candidates.correction_strategy: Bonferroni over family=4 (threshold=0.0125). C03 pair-space burden must be documented in P176 report.
candidates.expected_null_reporting_behavior: If p_bonferroni >= 0.0125: report FAIL_CORRECTED. The P173 NULL of component signals does NOT prove C07 will fail, but constitutes strong prior evidence that aggregation will not recover a null composite.

multiple_testing_plan.c03_internal_pair_space_burden: C(38,2)=703 edges. Degree-centrality selection implicitly tests which of 703 pairs is highly active. Bonferroni over family=4 does not account for this internal comparison. P176 report must explicitly state that effective Type I error rate for C03 may be higher than 0.0125 due to pair-space selection. This is not a fixable leakage — it is an inherent property of graph-based feature selection.
multiple_testing_plan.predeclaration_requirement: All candidate configs (configs listed in frozen_config_candidates per candidate) must be declared in this P175 artifact before any P176 OOS evaluation. No config changes after P176 begins.
multiple_testing_plan.null_ruling_per_candidate: Each candidate is independently assessed. A PASS for one candidate does not elevate others. If 0/4 candidates pass: overall NULL reported.
multiple_testing_plan.c07_dependency_note: C07 uses C03 as a component. If C03 is run in P176 concurrently with C07, the C03 run for C07 purposes must use the SAME config as standalone C03. No separate config tuning for C07's C03 component.

oos_protocol_plan.data_source: draws table, POWER_LOTTO records only, ordered by CAST(draw AS INTEGER) ASC
oos_protocol_plan.statistical_unit: per draw (distinct POWER_LOTTO draw), NOT per bet-row
oos_protocol_plan.no_bet_row_pseudo_replication: hit_count is assessed once per draw per candidate prediction, not per bet-row in strategy_prediction_replays table. Evaluating multiple bet-row hits per draw inflates effective sample size.
oos_protocol_plan.evaluation_metric: mean hit count per OOS draw vs random baseline 36/38 = 0.9474
oos_protocol_plan.hypothesis_test: one-sided z-test (H0: mean=36/38, H1: mean>36/38) using hypergeometric variance
baseline_comparisons: B2: constrained random C08 (documented, not fully implemented)
B3: P161 best strategy pool mean = 0.9674
B4: P173 best candidate (C04 mean=0.964) for comparison

leakage_prevention_plan.general_rule: All feature extraction for draw at index i must use only draws[0..i-1]. No exceptions.
leakage_prevention_plan.c03_specific: Pair co-occurrence adjacency matrix rebuilt from draws[0..i-1] for each OOS draw. No cached global matrix unless cache is invalidated at each new draw index.
leakage_prevention_plan.c05_specific: Distribution parameters (sum/span/MAD mean and std) computed from draws[0..i-1]. Expanding window — parameters update as each new draw is processed.
leakage_prevention_plan.c06_specific: CUSUM run sequentially on draws[0..i-1] at each prediction step. Output is single regime label for position i. Two-sided CUSUM or retrospective smoothing is prohibited.
leakage_prevention_plan.c07_specific: Each component (C01/C02/C04/C03) uses draws[0..i-1]. Borda aggregation applied after all component rankings computed.
leakage_prevention_plan.verification_method: P176 must include a leakage audit comment in script: for each candidate, document which draws are used in feature extraction at each OOS step. Auditable by inspection.

risk_assessment.overall_prior_probability: LOW — consistent with R1 (P161-P170 NULL), R2 Top 3 (P173 NULL), L91 (BIG_LOTTO at-random), POWER_LOTTO 38-number pool structure
risk_assessment.c03_risk: HIGH overfitting, HIGH multiple-testing burden (703 pairs), minimum 300 OOS draws required, co-occurrence graph may fit noise in 1913-draw history
risk_assessment.c05_risk: MEDIUM overfitting, fewer parameters, minimum 200 OOS draws, non-stationarity may cause distribution drift
risk_assessment.c06_risk: HIGH overfitting (5 CUSUM parameters), MEDIUM leakage risk (requires careful one-sided implementation), minimum 300 OOS draws, regime-adaptive approach theoretically motivated by P170 but not validated
risk_assessment.c07_risk: HIGH overfitting (inherits C03 pair-space burden), dependent on individually-null C01/C02/C04 components from P173, aggregation of null signals expected to be null
risk_assessment.cumulative_testing_burden: P161-P175 represents an extensive multiple-testing sequence across R1 and R2. The probability of at least one false positive increases with each additional family of tests. This systematic risk must be acknowledged in P176 reporting.
risk_assessment.recommendation_if_all_p176_null: If C03/C05/C06/C07 all FAIL_CORRECTED in P176: R2 research should be concluded. No further feature engineering exploration is warranted without a structural change (new data, new theoretical motivation, different lottery type with documented anomalies).

p176_scope_boundary.scope: read-only minimal prototype implementation of C03/C05/C06/C07 feature extraction and OOS evaluation only
allowed_in_p176: read-only SQL queries against draws and strategy_prediction_replays tables
analysis scripts in analysis/power_lotto/ directory only
OOS evaluation using pre-declared configs from this P175 artifact
forbidden_in_p176: strategy code in lottery_api/ or tools/ directories
p176_scope_boundary.p176_authorization_phrase: YES start P176 POWER_LOTTO R2 advanced feature minimal prototype read-only
